Title: Extends certain deadlines for purposes of the green roof tax abatement for certain properties in a city of one million or more persons
Summary: Extends certain deadlines for purposes of the green roof tax abatement for certain properties in a city of one million or more persons.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to extending certain deadlines for purposes of the green roof tax abatement for certain properties in a city of one million or more persons
